mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for e-way bill violations?

acceptedAnswer.text: the penalty for e-way bill violations is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

mainEntity.name: Can goods be released without paying penalty?

acceptedAnswer.text: This depends on the specific facts and regulatory framework applicable to your situation. Virtual Auditor provides case-specific advisory after understanding your circumstances. Call +91-99622 60333 for a preliminary assessment.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between Section 129 and 130?

acceptedAnswer.text: the difference between Section 129 and 130 is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

mainEntity.name: How to reply to e-way bill detention notice?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process involves multiple regulatory steps and compliance requirements. Virtual Auditor handles the end-to-end process including documentation, filing, and follow-up with relevant authorities. Timeline and cost depend on complexity — contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a specific assessment.

mainEntity.name: Can penalty be challenged in appeal?

acceptedAnswer.text: This depends on the specific facts and regulatory framework applicable to your situation. Virtual Auditor provides case-specific advisory after understanding your circumstances. Call +91-99622 60333 for a preliminary assessment.
